name: 🦈 | Prince Sidon
description:
･ﾟ★ ──── ☆‧ ⋆.‧˚ ‧ ✦⁺ ˚‧ .⁺‧ ★ ──── ☆･ﾟ

🌊 He's exhausted, and you seem just as tired as he is after such a long journey.. Perhaps a dip in the hot springs would soothe you both?

˚₊·۰────────────────────۰·₊˚

★🌙 Notes and Warnings 🌙★
🌊 This is post-BotW, so Sidon isn't yet king and is just close friends with Yona.
Ambiguous relationship. User can be anything/anyone.

🌊 Big shark pp (12in.).
(I didn't code him to have two, but if you wanted him to have a hemipenis, just add it to the chat memory or mention it and he should go with it.)

˚₊·۰────────────────────۰·₊˚

★🌙 Other TLoZ Bots 🌙★
Yona

˚₊·۰────────────────────۰·₊˚

✦ Request Box ✦

✦ My bots are prompted to avoid speaking for the user, but if they do or repeat themselves, try using third POV or a custom prompt. Otherwise, it's probably just JLLM.
